name: OneMedNet Corp
business: OneMedNet is a provider of clinical imaging innovation and curator of regulatory-grade Imaging Real World Data (iRWD™), offering direct access to clinical images and associated contextual patient records for life science companies.

exposures.sentence: OneMedNet is a global provider of clinical imaging innovation and curator of regulatory-grade Imaging Real World Data ( iRWDTM ).

Today, life science companies, including pharmaceutical companies, artificial intelligence ( AI ) developers, medical device businesses, and clinical research organizations, share the same widespread challenge in obtaining insight-rich, high-quality patient data that explicitly matches their precise cohort specifications.

Today, life science companies, including pharmaceutical companies, artificial intelligence ( AI ) developers, medical device businesses, and clinical research organizations, share the same widespread challenge in obtaining insight-rich, high-quality patient data that explicitly matches their precise cohort specifications.
Medical imaging and associated clinical data are indexed at each network site using state-of-the-art AI/ML technology.

tamClaims.claim: The global Real World Evidence solutions market size was estimated at USD $2.6 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% from 2024 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The global Real World Evidence solutions market size was estimated at USD $2.6 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% from 2024 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: The global Real World Data market is estimated to be valued at $7.51 billion in 2024 and is expected to exhibit a CAGR of 9.1% during the forecast period (2024-2031).
tamClaims.sentence: According to Coherent Market Insights, the global Real World Data market is estimated to be valued at $7.51 billion in 2024 and is expected to exhibit a CAGR of 9.1% during the forecast period (2024-2031).

tamClaims.claim: The global Real World Evidence solutions market is projected to grow from $2.62 billion in 2024 to $4.55 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 8.2%.
tamClaims.sentence: Our strategy is to continue growing our global footprint into areas where we expect high demand growth in t he global Real World Evidence solutions market, which is projected to grow from $2.62 billion in 2024 to $4.55 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 8.2%.
